ApplicationMethodConfigAllProjects Property

One Identity Manager API Server
Gets or sets a flag indicating if all projects should be loaded, even the ones not explicitly listed.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Config
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
